notes: AGGREGATE (reported-by-Iran Ministry of Health, 24 Jun 2025): 1,060 killed, 5,800 injuries in the Twelve-Day War. Recorded as aggregate.
AGGREGATE (HRANA, 28 Jun 2025): 1,190 killed (436 civilians, 435 military, 319 unconfirmed), 4,475 injured in the Twelve-Day War.
Israeli strike on an underground command center killed most of the IRGC Aerospace Force leadership convened for a meeting, including commander Amir Ali Hajizadeh (IDF; corroborated by ACLED/HRANA).
ACLED: Israel carried out nearly 360 attacks across 27 Iranian provinces over 12 days; over 150 strikes on military targets. Intensity concentrated in Tehran province.
HRANA verified reports: deaths of 4 fuel depot workers, 2 tanker drivers, and 3 factory guards in strikes on peripheral Tehran infrastructure; dozens more injured.
